title: taraxacum pseudobalticum
intro: Taraxacum pseudobalticum is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus, belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Taraxacum pseudobalticum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular natural remedy in traditional medicine.
